loan_contract_no.default: select max(loan_contract_no) from sc_lon_m_contract where loan_type = 'ส' and begining_of_contract >= sysdate - 3
loan_contract_no.text: เลขที่สัญญา

begining_of_contract.text: วันที่ขอกู้

root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, extract ( day from ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) ) as begin_day, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'MONTH') as begin_month, extract ( year from ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) ) + 543 as begin_year, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) as memname, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , to_number(to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'yyyy')) - to_number(to_char( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ,'yyyy')) as mem_age, sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code ) as group_distinct, pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code ) as group_province, sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no, sc_mem_m_member_address.moo, sc_mem_m_member_address.road, sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol, pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) as add_distinct, pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) as add_province, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ) as loan_approve_amount_thai, F_LON_GET_INTRATE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) as loan_int_rate, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount ) as period_payment_amount_thai, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , 'MONTH') as start_keep_month, extract ( year from ( sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date ) ) + 543 as start_keep_year, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.manager_name as group_manager_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.president_name,
decode( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , 'ส' , sc_cnt_m_coop.assit_manager , sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name ) as manager_name,
decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status , '1' , ( select prename || spouse_name || ' ' || spouse_surname from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info ,sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.prename_code and sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) , sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status ) as spouse_name ,
decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status , '1' , ( select sc_mem_m_ucf_ocupation.occupation_description from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info ,sc_mem_m_ucf_ocupation where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_ucf_ocupation.occupation_code = sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.occupation_code and sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) , '' ) as spouse_occupation ,
decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status , '1' , ( select salary_amount from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) , 0 ) as spouse_salary ,
si_security_user.user_name
FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_member_work_info, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr, sc_mem_m_member_address, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status , si_security_user, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status ) and ( si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) /*WHERE*/ -- AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'ส65000021' ) ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ASC
